_comment: PerfMation project configuration. Edit this file to set your integrated APM tool. The dashboard and workflows read this automatically.

apm._comment: Set 'tool' to whichever APM is integrated with your project. This value is read by the publish-dashboard workflow and pre-selects the tool automatically — you don't need to pick it manually each time you run a workflow.

_breach_action_options.log_only: Log violations to console and Step Summary. Job always passes. Test always runs to completion.
_breach_action_options.warn_and_log: Log violations as GitHub warning annotations. Job always passes. Test always runs to completion.
_breach_action_options.fail_job: Log violations and fail the GitHub Actions job after test completes. Test still runs to completion.

sla._note: The test itself is NEVER stopped mid-run by SLA validation. SLA checks run POST-TEST on results. To stop the LR test mid-run on breach, configure Controller SLA actions inside the .lrs scenario file.
